nasb.text: “I kept looking in the night visions, And behold, with the clouds of heaven One like a Son of Man was coming, And He came up to the Ancient of Days And was presented before Him.

esv.text: “I saw in the night visions, and behold, with the clouds of heaven there came one like a son of man, and he came to the Ancient of Days and was presented before him.

cnv.text: “我在夜間的異象中繼續觀看， 看見有一位像人子的， 駕著天雲而來， 到萬古常存者那裡， 被引領到他面前，

ccb.text: “我在夜间的异象中看见一位像人子的，驾着天云而来，到亘古长存者那里，被引到祂面前。
